역대상 4:1.content: The sons of Judah: Perez, Hezron, Carmi, Hur, and Shobal.

역대상 4:2.content: Reaiah the son of Shobal became the father of Jahath; and Jahath became the father of Ahumai and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.

역대상 4:3.content: These were the sons of the father of Etam: Jezreel, Ishma, and Idbash. The name of their sister was Hazzelelponi.

역대상 4:4.content: Penuel was the father of Gedor and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.

역대상 4:5.content: Ashhur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.

역대상 4:6.content: Naarah bore him Ahuzzam, Hepher, Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.

역대상 4:7.content: The sons of Helah were Zereth, Izhar, and Ethnan.

역대상 4:8.content: Hakkoz became the father of Anub, Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.

역대상 4:9.content: Jabez was more honorable than his brothers. His mother named him Jabez, saying, “Because I bore him with sorrow.”

역대상 4:10.content: Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, “Oh that you would bless me indeed, and enlarge my border! May your hand be with me, and may you keep me from evil, that I may not cause pain!” God granted him that which he requested.

역대상 4:11.content: Chelub the brother of Shuhah became the father of Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.

역대상 4:12.content: Eshton became the father of Beth Rapha, Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir Nahash. These are the men of Recah.

역대상 4:13.content: The sons of Kenaz: Othniel and Seraiah. The sons of Othniel: Hathath.

역대상 4:14.content: Meonothai became the father of Ophrah: and Seraiah became the father of Joab the father of Ge Harashim; for they were craftsmen.

역대상 4:15.content: The sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam. The son of Elah: Kenaz.

역대상 4:16.content: The sons of Jehallelel: Ziph, Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.

역대상 4:17.content: The sons of Ezrah: Jether, Mered, Epher, and Jalon; and she bore Miriam, Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.

역대상 4:18.content: His wife the Jewess bore Jered the father of Gedor, Heber the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah. These are the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh, whom Mered took.

역대상 4:19.content: The sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maacathite.

역대상 4:20.content: The sons of Shimon: Amnon, Rinnah, Ben Hanan, and Tilon. The sons of Ishi: Zoheth, and Ben Zoheth.

역대상 4:21.content: The sons of Shelah the son of Judah: Er the father of Lecah, Laadah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of those who worked fine linen, of the house of Ashbea;

역대상 4:22.content: and Jokim, and the men of Cozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had dominion in Moab, and Jashubilehem. These records are ancient.

역대상 4:23.content: These were the potters, and the inhabitants of Netaim and Gederah: they lived there with the king for his work.

역대상 4:24.content: The sons of Simeon: Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul;

역대상 4:25.content: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, and Mishma his son.

역대상 4:26.content: The sons of Mishma: Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son.

역대상 4:27.content: Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brothers didn’t have many children, and all their family didn’t multiply like the children of Judah.

역대상 4:28.content: They lived at Beersheba, Moladah, Hazarshual,

역대상 4:29.content: at Bilhah, at Ezem, at Tolad,

역대상 4:30.content: at Bethuel, at Hormah, at Ziklag,

역대상 4:31.content: at Beth Marcaboth, Hazar Susim, at Beth Biri, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities until David’s reign.

역대상 4:32.content: Their villages were Etam, Ain, Rimmon, Tochen, and Ashan, five cities;

역대상 4:33.content: and all their villages that were around the same cities, to Baal. These were their settlements, and they have their genealogy.

역대상 4:34.content: Meshobab, Jamlech, Joshah the son of Amaziah,

역대상 4:35.content: Joel, Jehu the son of Joshibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel,

역대상 4:36.content: Elioenai, Jaakobah, Jeshohaiah, Asaiah, Adiel, Jesimiel, Benaiah,

역대상 4:37.content: and Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah—

역대상 4:38.content: these mentioned by name were princes in their families. Their fathers’ houses increased greatly.

역대상 4:39.content: They went to the entrance of Gedor, even to the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.

역대상 4:40.content: They found fat pasture and good, and the land was wide, and quiet, and peaceful; for those who lived there before were descended from Ham.

역대상 4:41.content: These written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and struck their tents. The Meunim who were found there, and they destroyed them utterly to this day, and lived in their place; because there was pasture there for their flocks.

역대상 4:42.content: Some of them, even of the sons of Simeon, five hundred men, went to Mount Seir, having for their captains Pelatiah, Neariah, Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi.

역대상 4:43.content: They struck the remnant of the Amalekites who escaped, and have lived there to this day.
